# v1.0.0 Release Notes

Initial public release of finserv-agent-audit.

## What's included

- DEFCON Risk-State Machine — 5-level degradation with hysteresis, audit trail, state persistence
- Sovereign Veto — Autonomy Ladder A0→A4 with human-only kill switch
- Audit Chain — tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chain logging schema
- EU AI Act Mapping — Article 9, 12, 14, 15 control mapping
- Autonomy Ladder documentation — A0→A4 governance classification

## Quality bar

- 94% test coverage
- mypy strict — zero errors
- ruff — zero violations
- Zero runtime dependencies
- CI green on Python 3.12 + 3.13
- Under 60 seconds from clone to running demo

## Coming in v1.1

Shadow Mode Rollout, Drift Monitor, Rate Limiter, MiFID II Art. 17 checklist.
